headline: Western Digital’s Quantum Error Bet And What It Means For Valuation
summary: Western Digital (NasdaqGS:WDC) has joined Open Quantum Design and QuScript in a new open-source Error Correction Working Group. The collaboration focuses on quantum error correction, a key hurdle for practical quantum computing. The initiative draws on Western Digital's experience in large scale data reliability to inform quantum error handling. Western Digital, best known for storage devices and data infrastructure solutions, is stepping into quantum error correction through this new...
